## What got verified, not just claimed

The catch worth calling out: my first migration had a real bug — `resolve_resource_id` guarded the `::uuid` cast inside an `OR`, and Postgres doesn't short-circuit that, so it threw `invalid input syntax for type uuid` on every real slug. I only found it because I tested the **live** round-…
